understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate each level’s grid and complete (activate) every goal cell by stepping onto it only when the carried piece’s shape, color, and rotation exactly match that goal’s required attributes; completing all goals advances levels, and finishing all levels wins.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move costs 1 stamina; when stamina hits 0 you lose 1 life and stamina resets to the maximum, and losing all lives ends the game. Movement is blocked by walls, and the state provides a "blocked_directions" list of moves that cannot be taken from the current cell (attempting them wastes the turn/stamina with no position change). Special modifier tiles change the carried piece when stepped on: shape changers cycle shape 0–5 (wrap), color changers cycle colors in order orange→blue→green→red→orange, and rotation changers rotate 90° clockwise (0°→90°→180°→270°→0°). A goal cell completes only when all three attributes match simultaneously upon stepping onto it; routing must account for reaching needed modifier tiles and avoiding blocked paths to minimize wasted moves within the turn/stamina constraints.

Special modifier tiles change the carried piece when stepped on: shape changers cycle shape 0–5 (wrap), color changers cycle colors in order orange→blue→green→red→orange, and rotation changers rotate 90° clockwise (0°→90°→180°→270°→0°).
